description: ROSENDALE ROAD, West Dulwich: Route 322 is on diversion in both directions due to roadworks. Buses are missing the Hail & Ride section on Rosendale Road. Pick up your bus on either Tritton Road or at the Martell Road stops on Park Hall Road.

MAXWELL ROAD, Northwood: Route 331 is on diversion in both directions due to roadworks. Buses are missing stops Hawkesworth Close, Leaf Close, and Northwood Golf Course (W) towards Ruislip and stops Northwood Golf Course (V), Leaf Close, and Northwood College Nursery School towards Uxbridge.

MAIN ROAD, TN14: ROUTES R5 R10 towards Knockholt Pound/Park Cornor will not serve stops 'Hail & Ride Old Hill Playground' to 'Knockholt Pound/Park Corner' due to road works. Please allow extra time for your journey.

BROOKE ROAD, E5: Route 425 is curtailed due to a carriageway defect. Buses towards Kenninghall Road are terminating at ‘Lea Bridge Roundabout’ and towards Hainault Street are starting from ‘Clapton Road’.

BAKER STREET, EN1: From 09:00 on Friday 10 July until 17:00 on Sunday 12 July, ROUTE W8 towards Chase Farm Hospital, is on diversion due to Thames Water works taking place on Baker Street. Bus stops from 'Parsonage Lane' (M) to 'Browning Road' (Q) will not be served. Please allow extra time for your journey.

EBURY STREET, SW1: ROUTE C1 towards White City, is on diversion due to works taking place on Ebury Street. Bus stops 'Belgravia Police Station' (X) and 'Ebury Street' will not be served. Please allow extra time for your journey.

WOOLWICH ROAD, SE7: Until 23:59 Monday 13 July, ROUTES 161 177 N1 towards North Greenwich and Peckham, are on diversion via Anchor & Hope Lane, Bugsby's Way and Peartree Way, due to emergency gas works taking place at Woolwich Road. Bus stops from 'Woolwich Road / Gallions Road' to 'Rainton Road' (J) will not be served. Please allow additional time for your journey.

ORDNANCE ROAD: Until 23:00 Thursday 31 December 2026, route 276 towards Newham Hospital is on diversion via Manor Road and Barking Road due to signal works at Ordnance Road. Buses are not serving the stops 'Star Lane Station/Star Primary School,' 'Exning Road' and 'Malmesbury Terrace.'

ERSKINE ROAD,SM5: ROUTE S1 is on diversion in both directions via Wrthye Lane, West Street,  Colston Avenue, Westmead Road, Lower Road, Thicket Road and Oakhill Road due to emergency utility works Hail and Ride requests along Oakhill Road will be not be served.

ERSKINE ROAD,SM5: ROUTE S1 is on diversion in both directions via Wrthye Lane,  West Street,  Colston Avenue,  Westmead Road,  Lower Road,  Thicket Road and  Oakhill Road due to emergency utility works. Hail and Ride requests along Oakhill Road will be not be served in either direction.

QUEENSWAY, W2: ROUTE 70 is on diversion towards Chiswick due to emergency Thames Water works. Buses are diverting via Notting Hill Gate, Pembridge Road and Pembridge Villas. Stops from 'Palace Gardens Terrace' (M) to 'Westbourne Grove / Queensway' (G) will not be served. Please allow extra time for your journey.

WEST END LANE, NW6: ROUTES 31 N28 N31 towards Camden Town Station are on diversion via  Fairfax Road, Finchley Road, Broadhurst Gardens, Canfield Gardens to change direction back onto  Finchley Road and Avenue Road due to Thames Water works. Bus stops 'Finchley Road' (K) and 'Swiss Cottage Station' (M) will be missed.

WOOLWICH MANOR WAY, E6: Until Friday 24 July at 20:00, ROUTES 129 262 678 & N551 are on diversion towards Gallions Reach only due to safety issues. Buses are not serving stops 'Covelees Wall' (G) and 'Horse Leaze' (A). Please allow extra time for your buses.

HATTON ROAD, TW14: ROUTE H25 towards Hatton Cross Station is on diversion via Staines Road,  A30 Great South West Road, Stanwell Road, using the roundabout to change direction back onto Stanwell Road and Hatton Road due to emergency gas works. Bus stop 'St Mary's Church' (X) will be missed.

HATTON ROAD, TW14: ROUTE H25 towards Fullwell Park is on diversion via  Stanwell Road,  A30 Great South West Road and  Staines Road due to emergency gas works. Bus stop ' St Mary's Church' (T) will be missed.

HATTON ROAD, TW14: ROUTE H26 towards Hatton Cross Station is on diversion via A30 Great South West Road,  Stanwell Road, using the roundabout at Beacon Road to change direction back onto Stanwell Road and Hatton Road due to emergency gas works. Bus stops 'Spinney Drive' (B) and 'St Mary's Church' (X) will be missed.

HATTON ROAD, TW14: ROUTE H26 towards Hounslow Heath is on diversion via Stanwell Road, A30 Great South West Road and  Bedfont Road due to emergency gas works. Bus stops 'St Mary's Church' (T) and 'Spinney Drive' (P) will be missed.
HEATON AVENUE, Havering: ROUTE 499 is on diversion both ways via Straight Road, due to roadworks on Heaton Avenue. Buses are not serving Heaton Avenue, Keats Avenue or Grange Road in both directions.

CHEAPSIDE: From 07:00 Saturday 11 July till 21:00 Sunday 19 July, the road will be closed due to a crane operation. ROUTES 26, N26 and N551 are diverted in both directions, missing stops between Bank Station / Queen Victoria Street and King William Street/ Monument Station. The old Broad Street Stop will not be served.

CHEAPSIDE: From 07:00 Saturday 11 July till 21:00 Sunday 19 July, the road will be closed due to a crane operation. ROUTES 26, N26 and N551 are diverted in both directions, missing stops between Bank Station / Queen Victoria Street and King William Street/ Monument Station. The old Broad Street Stop will not be served.

NORTHWOOD ROAD, SE25: ROUTE 450 is on diversion in both directions via High Street, Whitehorse Lane, South Norwood Hill and Beulah Hill, due to Thames Water works taking place at Northwood Road. Towards Upper Norwood, bus stops from 'Parchmore Methodist Church' to 'Beulah Hill' (EG) will not be served. Towards West Croydon, bus stops from 'Beulah Hill' (WF) to 'Thornton Heath Clock Tower' (F) will not be served. Please allow additional time for your journey.

BROADHURST GARDENS, NW6: Route C11 is on diversion one way towards Archway Station due to road blocked by a burst water main. Buses will not serve stops 'West Hampstead Station' to 'Finchley Road/College Crescent'. Please allow extra time for your journey.

WEST END LANE, NW6: ROUTE 139 towards Golders Green is on diversion via Belsize Road,  Fairfax Road, Finchley Road,  Broadhurst Gardens,  Canfield Gardens,  Cleve Road and  West End Lane due to Thames Water works. Bus stops from 'Priory Road' (H) to 'Woodchurch Road' (M) will be missed.

WEST END LANE, NW6: ROUTE 139 towards Waterloo is on diversion via Iverson Road, Kilburn High Road and Belsize Road due to Thames Water works. Bus stops from 'West Hampstead Station' to 'Belsize Road' will be missed. Please allow extra time for your journey.

WEST END LANE, NW6: ROUTE 328 towards Golders Green is on diversion via Abbey Road,    Belsize Road,  Fairfax Road,  Finchley Road, Broadhurst Gardens,  Canfield Gardens,  Cleve Road and  West End Lane due Thames Water works. Bus stops 'West End Lane' (J) and 'Woodchurch Road' (M) will be missed.

WEST END LANE, NW6: ROUTE 328 towards Chelsea is on diversion via Iverson Road and Kilburn High Road due to Thames Water works. Bus stops 'West Hampstead Station' and 'Quex Road will be missed. Please allow extra time for your journey.
WOODMANSTERNE ROAD CR5: Road blocked by roadworks. ROUTE 463 is diverted via Bramley Avenue. Hail & Ride Clifton Road NOT SERVED.

BIDEFORD AVENUE, Perivale: ROUTE E5 is disrupted in both directions due to a collision on Bideford Avenue. Buses are not serving the full route. Buses are terminating / starting at Medway Parade. There is NO service between Medway Parade and Tesco (Perivale) in both directions.

ST MARGARET STREET, SW1: Route 87 is currently on diversion both ways between Parliament Square and Vauxhall Bridge. Buses are diverting via Great Smith Street / Marsham Street / John Islip Street. Buses towards Wandsworth are not serving stops from "Horseferry Road / Lambeth Bridge" ('NB') to "Vauxhall Bridge Road" (W). Buses towards Aldwych are not serving stops from "Vauxhall Bridge Road" (T) to "Horseferry Road" (NK).

ST MARGARET STREET, SW1: Route N87 is currently on diversion both ways between Parliament Square and Vauxhall Bridge. Buses are diverting via Great Smith Street / Marsham Street / John Islip Street. Buses towards Kingston are not serving stops from "Abingdon Street" ('L') to "Vauxhall Bridge Road" (W). Buses towards Aldwych are not serving stops from "Vauxhall Bridge Road" (T) to "Horseferry Road" (NK).

ST MARGARET STREET, SW1: Route N3 is currently on diversion both ways via Marsham Street. Buses towards Bromley are not serving stops from "Abingdon Street" ('L') and "Horseferry Road / Lambeth Bridge" (NB). Buses towards Oxford Circus are not serving the stop "Horseferry Road" (NK).

WALWORTH ROAD, SE17: Routes 12 and 171 are on diversion both ways between Camberwell Green and Elephant & Castle, due to a building fire. Diversion via Camberwell New Road and Newington Butts. Buses towards Oxford Circus / Elephant & Castle are not serving stops from "Camberwell Green" (F) to "Heygate Street" (Z). Buses towards East Dulwich / Catford are not serving stops from "Elephant & Castle Station" (R) to "Medlar Street" (A).

WALWORTH ROAD, SE17: Routes 35 and 40 are on diversion both ways between Camberwell Green and Elephant & Castle, due to a building fire. Diversion via Camberwell New Road and Newington Butts. Buses towards Shoreditch / Clerkenwell are not serving stops from "Camberwell Green" ('E') to "Hampton Street". Buses towards Clapham / Dulwich are not serving stops from "Elephant & Castle Station" ('R') to "Medlar Street" ('B' / 'A').

WALWORTH ROAD, SE17: Routes 68, 148, 176 and 468 are on diversion both ways between Camberwell Green and Elephant & Castle, due to a building fire. Diversion via Camberwell New Road and Newington Butts. Buses towards Euston / White City / Tottenham Court Road / Elephant & Castle are not serving stops from "Camberwell Green" ('F') to "Heygate Street" ('Z'). Buses towards West Norwood / Camberwell / Penge / Croydon are not serving stops from "Elephant & Castle Station" ('R') to "Medlar Street" ('B' / 'A').
